# File Utility Golden Vectors

These vectors characterize deterministic PSFTP directory-listing behavior before KMP migration: path normalization, recursive traversal, shallow traversal, entry-name filtering, emitted full paths, low-level read/write/delete command routing, public facade command routing, and runtime error scenarios. `FileRuntimeErrorPolicyCommonTest.kt` now executes shared common coverage for file listing traversal, low-level read/write/delete command capture, malformed directory payloads, request transport errors, response errors, directory-missing status, write-stream failures, and `runtime-error-readiness.json` behavior-family coverage; `FileFacadeRuntimePolicyCommonTest.kt` consumes `file-facade-runtime-policy.json` to pin public facade GET/PUT/REMOVE command planning, empty read payload success, payload capture, write progress before completion, read failures, delete request failures, read/write/delete response-error mapping, and write-stream failures after payload construction. Backup restore has separate vectors under `backup-utils`.

`file-facade-runtime-readiness.json` names the pre-migration behavior-family gate for the low-level public file facade runtime slice: `/U/0/CUSTOM.BIN`, `/U/0/EMPTY.BIN`, and `/U/0/PROGRESS.BIN` path usage, GET/PUT/REMOVE planning, empty read payload success, read request failures, read response-error mapping, payload capture, write progress before completion, write response-error mapping after payload capture, write-stream failure after payload construction, delete request failures, delete response-error mapping, directory-list vector references, runtime-error-policy coverage, response-error policy, public facade error mapping, platform facade vector references, and the `compile-verification-gate` must remain covered before production file facade planning moves into shared KMP code.

`runtime-error-readiness.json` names the pre-migration behavior-family gate for low-level file runtime errors: directory missing status 103, malformed directory payload parse failure, read-file transport errors, write PUT header and payload capture before stream failure, delete response-error status/message mapping, command/path capture, facade error mapping deferral, platform runtime vector references, and the `compile-verification-gate` must remain covered before file utility orchestration moves into shared KMP code.
